prompt: A dreamy mixed-media pastel illustration on textured white paper with a visible vertical fold down the center, in a naive childlike crayon-and-oil-pastel style. Show a half-hidden portrait of a girl placed slightly left of center, with only part of her face visible because a large soft-edged rectangular blur obscures the middle of the image from forehead to chest. The visible features include dark teal-black hair, one warm brown eye, hints of cheek and neck, and a cream or pale yellow garment. Surround her with loose scribbled botanical lines and abstract strokes in turquoise, olive green, black, white, ochre, and peach. Scatter hand-drawn Japanese hiragana and numbers around the composition like children’s marks on paper: 「新」 and 「し」 in orange at the upper left, 「お」「ば」「ら」 stacked vertically on the upper right in mustard and dark olive, a small turquoise flag shape at mid-right, an orange sun symbol near the lower center-right, the number-like text 「11.6」 in brown at the lower right, and an orange open-book icon at the lower left. Add several sweeping diagonal crayon lines in golden yellow and white crossing behind and around the figure. Keep the composition airy, imperfect, expressive, and slightly melancholic, with rough grainy pigment, visible paper texture, muted earthy colors, and the feel of a child’s memory drawing combined with contemporary art illustration.
